description: Adds rectangular section(s). Specify by a center plus a corner, or by two/three points.

keywords.name: center
keywords.description: Create a rectangle by specifying its center location v1 (2D coordinate vector) and one corner v2 (2D coordinate vector). Must be followed by a 'point' sub-keyword.

keywords.name: center-point
keywords.description: Used after 'center <v1>'. Specifies a corner v2 of the rectangle (2D coordinate vector).

keywords.name: point-1
keywords.description: Create a rectangle from two or three points (2D coordinate vectors). If only point-1 and point-2 are given, they define two opposite corners. If point-3 is also given, point-1 and point-2 define two adjacent corners and point-3 lies on the opposite side.

keywords.name: point-1-point-2
keywords.description: Used after 'point-1 <v1>'. Specifies the second point of the rectangle (2D coordinate vector).

keywords.name: point-1-point-3
keywords.description: Used after 'point-1 <v1> point-2 <v2>'. Optional third point (2D coordinate vector); when present, point-1/point-2 define adjacent corners and point-3 lies on the opposite side.
